title: OPL .n1a bundle manifest (v0.1)
description: Manifest schema for a Wave-6 .n1a bundle. ADR-0023. CANONICAL COPY (CancerDAO/opl-cancer). MIRRORED to CancerDAO/n1arxiv per ADR-0024 — both files must stay byte-identical; any schema change is a two-PR change.

opl_version.description: Version of opl-cancer that produced this bundle.

patient_id_hash.description: SHA-256 hex (truncated OK) of the patient_code. Never the raw patient_code.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at the moment the bundle was packed.

run_id.description: OPL run_id this bundle was packed from.

data_source.description: Classifier for the underlying input. Non-real_patient values force the bundle's banner / watermark (P2-#18).

file_index.description: Ordered list of relative file paths included in the bundle.

sha256s.description: Mapping from relative file path -> SHA-256 hex digest.

cost_summary.description: Aggregated session cost (P2-#20). May be empty if cost_tracker was disabled.

henry_audit_summary.description: Mirror of HENRY_AUDIT.json status field for quick CI inspection.

extends_prior_run.description: P2-#17 prior-run ingestion: run_id of the prior MTB / OPL run this manuscript extends, if any.

banner.description: Optional banner string for non-real_patient bundles, e.g. '[METHODOLOGY DEMONSTRATION — NOT REAL PATIENT]'.
